visual_beats: Close-up on a person's eyes in a mirror, then their eyes blink.
The reflection in the mirror blinks a full second later than the person.
The person blinks again, eyes wide, staring intently at the mirror. The reflection remains still, unblinking.
The person turns their head away from the mirror, eyes looking down in disbelief and fear.
A slow, ominous scraping sound is heard. The person glances back towards the mirror.
The reflection in the mirror is now smiling unnaturally, while the person's face is frozen in fear.
The reflection slowly raises a hand to the mirror's surface, tapping it from the inside.
The reflection's mouth moves, mouthing the word 'Mine' directly at the viewer, before lunging forward to smash through the glass.
